      Setting light time Of The approaching lighting 设置接近照明的时间,原ID为SETTING_FUNC_APPROACHING_LIGHTING_TIME ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ILamp.LightingTimeLevel property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 09:41:09

      to change between off and on for automatic courtesy light setting 自动礼貌灯设置(门控灯),开门点亮座舱，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_LAMP_AUTOMATIC_COURTESY_LIGHT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 09:42:51
      static int LAMP_DAYTIME_LIGHT
      Daytime running light status, original ID: DAYTIME_LIGHT_STATUS 日间行车灯，原 ID 为 DAYTIME_LIGHT_STATUS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-16 15:59:45
      static int LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL
      Exterior light control system indicates which light the driver has chosen 外灯控制选择(设置)，原ID为SETTING_FUNC_LAMP_EXTERIOR_LIGHT_CONTROL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE ILamp.ExteriorLightControlValue property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-19 09:55:24
      static int LAMP_FRONT_POSITION
      Front position light status, original ID: FRONT_POSITION_STATUS 前位置灯，原 ID 为FRONT_POSTITION_STATUS ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type mutao.yu@hiecarx.com created for project hongqi at 2024-07-16 15:56:57
